web.title: Madda playground — web
web.blurb: Integrated UI on the same process as :routes; API and webhooks stay on the Laravel-style router; React pages live under :folder (App Router style). Shared API paths and types live in @madda/contracts; OpenAPI at GET /v1/openapi.json.
web.demo_hint: NavLink navigation does not reload the full page.
web.auth_blurb: Login uses POST /v1/auth/login; the session id is stored in an httpOnly cookie (no tokens in localStorage). After seeding, try demo@playground.local / password.
web.realtime_blurb: Subscribes to Server-Sent Events on /broadcast/sse. Use the button to POST /v1/demo/broadcast and push an event to channel playground-demo.
web.realtime_empty: (waiting for events — click the button or open another tab)
